subcodes.first_line: O ye twin shining candles of the love of God! Kindle ye the flame in the gathering of the spiritual assembly and burn with the fire of divine love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شمع روشن محبت الله در بین جمع محفل روحانی برافروزید و باتش عشق بسوزید و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
